narrative:
Bowling Green 3-C (precinct in Wood County) has 239 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 1.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 2.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
